products.name: EchoShield®
products.descriptor: Medium-range pulse-Doppler MESA radar for multi-mission ground and airspace surveillance

evidence.snippet: EchoShield® Radar – Long-Range 4D Drone Detection & Tracking

The market-leading medium-range radar combines low SWaP, mission agility, and full mobility to deliver superior situational awareness on any platform or system in any domain.
[
EchoShield radars are commercially exportable under ECCN 6A008.e.

products.notes: ECCN 6A008.e export classification cited; no NDAA §848/889 claim found.

products.name: EchoGuard®
products.descriptor: Short-range FMCW MESA radar with ultra-low SWaP for C-UAS and perimeter surveillance

evidence.snippet: EchoGuard® Radar – Compact C-UAS & Ground Surveillance Radar

The market-leading short-range radar combines ultra-low SWaP, maximum portability, and category-leading reliability and performance to deliver high-definition situational awareness across air and surface domains.
[
EchoGuard radars are commercially exportable under ECCN 6A008.e.

products.notes: ECCN 6A008.e export classification cited; no NDAA §848/889 claim found. Available in Tan, Green, Gray, White; kits include QSK, LDK, TMK.

products.name: EchoFlight®
products.descriptor: Short-range FMCW airborne MESA radar for UAS detect-and-avoid and air-air surveillance

evidence.snippet:
###### The market-leading short-range airborne radar combines ultra-low SWaP and high performance to extend situational awareness as far as the UAS can operate.
[

products.notes: Weight <1 kg, power <50 W; designed as UAS-mounted airborne sensor. No export or compliance claims found in corpus.

products.name: EchoWare™
products.descriptor: Software platform for unified management and networking of Echodyne MESA radar systems

evidence.snippet: EchoWare™ - Multiple radars in one seamless, managed radar system

### EchoWare delivers.
EchoWare is Echodyne's next-generation software platform built on a modern, software-defined architecture. It manages and operates a network of Echodyne radars as a unified system—from single-radar tactical deployments to complex multi-site networks spanning vast operational areas.

products.notes: Runs on Ubuntu 20.04/22.04 or Windows 10/11 (x86-64, min 4-core, 16 GB RAM). Supports headless API mode, protocol translators, and managed track handoff across radar networks.

products.name: EchoGuard CR
products.descriptor: Close-range 3D MESA radar for urban perimeter and C-UAS surveillance

evidence.snippet:
**EchoGuard CR**
EchoGuard CR radar uses MESA radar technology to meet demand for high-performance radar for close range security within commercial budgets. The solution delivers advanced 3D perimeter surveillance for critical infrastructure with reduced energy output for greater accuracy in cluttered and busy semi-/urban environments.

products.notes: Announced October 2020; not listed on current (2026) product pages. May have been rebranded to or superseded by current EchoGuard.

products.name: RadarHub
products.descriptor: Pre-engineered hardware control cabinet for managing up to 5 networked radars

evidence.snippet:
**RadarHub**
RadarHub is a pre-engineered control cabinet solution that simplifies deployment, networking, and operations of multi-radar installations. The solution connects up to 5 radars and conveniently manages all key performance parameters, including power and network, through a single interface.

products.notes: Announced October 2020 alongside EchoGuard CR; not listed on current (2026) product pages. Likely superseded by EchoWare software platform. UL-508A compliant construction mentioned.
